transcript.text:
Lower the mic
Hello everyone~
For today's mukbang,
I have sashimi
I'm a shark today
Rockfish, salmon, tuna
Red snapper,
This one is bass
I ordered pretty much everything they had
I wanted to plate them nicely on a board with kelp noodles
But it just came with ice instead
So I couldn't really plate them nicely
It's weird
Bon appetit
It fell
I think this will end in 30 minutes

This isn't enough food
That's so good
Abalone
It's always been my dream to eat sushi like this
You can never eat 3 pieces at a time when you're eating with someone else
Raw scallop
With some sesame oil
Rockfish
With Ssamjang (Soybean Seasoning Paste)
I prefer dipping sashimi in ssamjang over chojang (chili pepper paste with vinegar)
Salmon
Absolutely stunning
With some soy sauce
Tuna this time
It's a Bluefin Tuna
Dip in sesame oil

And then soy sauce
I asked for a lot of belly meat and they gave me a lot!
Black Seabream
I didn't know what they looked like They're red
That's delicious
Should I use some chojang?
There are soy sauce and wasabi here too
That's innovative
That was wasabi
Sashimi
is the best
This is for the thumbnail
I've never eaten tuna like this
That's better than beef
Wait no,
Whatever

I forgot to review it
I was just eating because it was so good
The scallop has 3 different textures: meat, intestines, and outer part
The meat is tender
The outer part is crispy
Intestines are just tasty
Bass is similar to the rockfish
And everyone knows salmon and tuna
Let's try the black seabream again I forgot its taste
It has a very distinctive flavor
It's really yummy
It's worth the money
So tasty
Now with some ssamjang
Salmon=soy sauce
You will get scolded if you eat like this at a company outing

I keep dropping 1
Rankings?
Tuna is #1
#2 Salmon
#3 Black Seabream
#4 Rockfish
#5 Bass
5th place is still delicious
3 pieces
With ssamjang
Yummy
Can I eat this quickly?
I have a blowfish costume too Should I wear that?
Dip in ssamjang
The best
Bass cleared

I'm starting to get cold as I eat
Cooked abalone is tasty too
I made some space for the noodles
Abalone got cooked
Kimchi?
Sharks don't eat Ramyun
It's a special one
Rockfish cleared
Tasty
Noodles and sashimi is yummy
It goes well
Yum
Sharks would probably eat scallops if you feed it
This needs to be scraped
Oil dip
The scallop meat melts in my mouth

And this outer part is chewy
It has a crispy texture
You guys can try it raw and if you don't like it, just cook it
It breaks
Welcome
Yes, I always leave the best ones for last
Tuna and salmon are amazing Just look at it
Sharks don't squeeze lemon on fish
The abalone is perfectly cooked
So good
It's the best
[Chat: They say seafood won't make you fat] It will if you eat a lot
Oil and soy sauce
This looks like thinly sliced pork belly
I thought all the ice would melt by the time I finish eating
But it didn't

That was such a great meal
Thanks everyone~
